/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/pengy_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/chathistory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/chatview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/chatinput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/chatworker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy.dir/settingsdialog.cpp.o -o pengy -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /Users/patw/dev/PengyR/target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/libpengy_core.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework Security -framework CoreFoundation -framework SystemConfiguration -lpthread -ldl /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
